'''Shindra's Veil''' was a nebula in the [[Tapani sector/Legends|Tapani sector]]. It was the location of the [[Battle of Shindra's Veil]] around [[7328 BBY]] between [[Shey Tapani]] and the [[Rogue Houses]] at the end of the [[Unification War]]. Shey's ships won the battle, allowing him to unite Tapani sector. During the [[Unification Gala]], shortly before the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]], [[Ajax Wennel]] participated in a staged reproduction of the battle.
